title: Binary Tree Level Order Trace
outputFormat: Array of arrays where each array stores one level from left to right.
constraints: The number of nodes is in range [0, 2000].

visuals.title: Level-by-level view
visuals.caption: Each queue cycle consumes one level.

solutionVisuals.title: BFS queue progression
solutionVisuals.caption: Queue size determines current level width.
